reports.title: Fallback Diabetes Test
reports.rawText: Patient report shows diabetes mellitus. Glucose 168 mg/dL. HbA1c high. Follow-up advised.
reports.aiSummary:
Main findings detected: Hemoglobin, Glucose.
Status distribution from the extracted findings: 1 low, 0 normal, 1 high.
The report also mentions follow-up or repeat review.
Use the detailed findings, FAQs, and next-step notes below to guide your discussion with your doctor.

183 """#question 10 	my god this question was hard couldnt even move it had to watch a
video and still coulnt do it then had to ask chatgpt to do it for me and explain every
single line
184 s = "ccaabpde"
185 p = "c*a*b..."
186 m = len(s)
187 n = len(p)
188
189 dp = [[False] * (n + 1) for _ in range(m + 1)]
3/29/26, 10:22 AM 	Python Code
https://www.codeconvert.ai/python-to-pdf 	4/7

-- 4 of 7 --

190
191 dp[0][0] = True
192
193 for j in range(2, n + 1):
194 	if p[j - 1] == '*':
195 	dp[0][j] = dp[0][j - 2]
196
197 for i in range(1, m + 1):
198 	for j in range(1, n + 1):
199
200 	if p[j - 1] == s[i - 1] or p[j - 1] == '.':
201 	dp[i][j] = dp[i - 1][j - 1]
202
203 	elif p[j - 1] == '*':
204 	dp[i][j] = dp[i][j - 2]
205
206 	if p[j - 2] == s[i - 1] or p[j - 2] == '.':
207 	dp[i][j] = dp[i][j] or dp[i - 1][j]
208
209 result = dp[m][n]
210 print(result)"""

faqs.question: What does low hemoglobin mean?
faqs.answer: Hemoglobin is lower than the expected range and may indicate anemia or low oxygen-carrying capacity.

faqs.question: What does high glucose mean?
faqs.answer: Glucose is higher than the expected range and is above the usual fasting range.

recommendations.text: Discuss iron-rich meal options and any required supplements with your doctor.
Discuss blood sugar monitoring and repeat testing with your doctor.
